title: Elyplate
description: Fly with your elytra while having a chestplate equiped with the new Elyplate!
body:
# Get your elytra and chestplate as one!
The elyplate is a balanced datapack/resourcepack that allows you to attach elytras to netherite chestplates for flying and defense at the same time! 


```
If using the Datapack version, please make sure to download the required resourcepack on the versions tab! 
```


The elyplate allows you to fly and survive damage! Unbreaking is less efficient when flying to balance it! 

![Recipe for Elyplates](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/459a2dd71db698b8f5123261932c560d91e91dcf.png)

To craft it just put an elyta, a netherite chestplate, and a phantom membrane in the smithing table, and you'll get your new elyplate! 

## Wanna feel fancy? Trim it! 
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e3457b540772cdb05a357e246b22e709e03f512.png)

You can trim the Elyplates with the integrated TrimMe2 implementation! 
With this you can also trim normal elytras alone, enjoy the bling bling! 

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/554fbc59f29993238fd1ea7b64ae4586eea6e6d5.png)
